text:
(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates that include a thin blue line and the words “Back the Blue.”

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of an account created by the comptroller in the manner provided by Section 504.6012 (Elimination of Dedicated Revenue Accounts; Revenues in Trust) (b). Money deposited to that account may be used only by the Employees Retirement System of Texas to provide financial assistance to survivors of peace officers under Chapter 615 (Financial Assistance to Survivors of Certain Law Enforcement Officers, Fire Fighters, and Others) , Government Code.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.668 (In God We Trust License Plates) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(65), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.669 — Back the Blue License Plates

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates that include a thin blue line and the words “Back the Blue.”

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of an account created by the comptroller in the manner provided by Section 504.6012 (Elimination of Dedicated Revenue Accounts; Revenues in Trust) (b). Money deposited to that account may be used only by the Employees Retirement System of Texas to provide financial assistance to survivors of peace officers under Chapter 615 (Financial Assistance to Survivors of Certain Law Enforcement Officers, Fire Fighters, and Others) , Government Code.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.668 (In God We Trust License Plates) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(65), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 116 (H.B.263), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2017.*

Money deposited to that account may be used only by the Employees Retirement System of Texas to provide financial assistance to survivors of peace officers under Chapter 615 (Financial Assistance to Survivors of Certain Law Enforcement Officers, Fire Fighters, and Others) , Government Code.
Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.668 (In God We Trust License Plates) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(65), eff. September 1, 2019.
